selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录
words.definition: n. the aggregate of past events

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 变化, 找回的零钱, 找头, 更换；vt. 改变, 更换, 兑换
words.definition: n. an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 力, 体力, 力量, 势力, 动力, 权力, 强国, 乘方, 强度, 幂, 功率；vt. 使...有力量, 供以动力, 激励
words.definition: n. possession of controlling influence

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: n. 大学
words.definition: n. the body of faculty and students at a university

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: n. 主人, 硕士, 大师, 母机；a. 主人的, 主要的
words.definition: n. directs the work of others

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 视野, 风景, 见解, 视力, 观看, 视图, 指望, 意图, 印象；vt. 看, 考虑, 视察, 查看, 估量
words.definition: n. the visual percept of a region

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: a. 完全的, 十足的, 完成的；vt. 完成, 完工, 使圆满
n. 盖子, 封面, 藉口；vt. 覆盖, 掩饰, 保护, 掩护, 包括
words.definition: n. the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 食物, 养料
words.definition: n. any substance that can be metabolized by an animal to give energy and build tissue

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: n. 比赛, 玩耍, 比分, 得胜, 比赛规则, 策略, 游戏, 野味；vi. 赌博
words.definition: n. a contest with rules to determine a winner

words.translation: n. 杀, 杀戮, 小河；vt. 杀, 破坏, 消灭, 使终止, 抵消, 否决
words.definition: n. the destruction of an enemy plane or ship or tank or missile

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 专辑, 专车, 号外, 特别的东西, 负有特别任务的人员；a. 特别的, 专门的, 特殊的, 额外的, 附加的, 特别亲密的
words.definition: n. a special offering (usually temporary and at a reduced price) that is featured in advertising

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 公主, 王妃, 女巨头
words.definition: n. a female member of a royal family other than the queen (especially the daughter of a sovereign)

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: a. no longer having or seeming to have or expecting to have life

words.translation: n. 死亡
words.definition: n. the event of dying or departure from life

words.translation: n. 领域, 田地, 场地, 战场, 场, 域；vt. 使...晒在场上, 使上场
words.definition: n. a piece of land cleared of trees and usually enclosed

words.translation: n. 玻璃, 玻璃杯, 透镜；vt. 装玻璃于, 反射, 反映
words.definition: n. a brittle transparent solid with irregular atomic structure

words.translation: adv. 直接地, 立刻, 立即
words.definition: r. without delay or hesitation; with no time intervening

words.translation: vi. 听, 倾听, 听从；n. 听, 倾听
words.definition: v. hear with intention

words.translation: n. 婚姻, 结婚, 婚礼, 合并
words.definition: n. the state of being a married couple voluntarily joined for life (or until divorce)

words.translation: pron. 我自己, 我亲自, 我独自
words.definition: pron. I or me in person; -- used for emphasis, my own self or

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: n. 重复, 反复；vt. 重做, 重复, 复述, 使再现, 复制
words.definition: n. an event that repeats

words.translation: n. 景观, 视力, 眼界, 阅读, 见解, 意见；vt. 看见, 瞄准
words.definition: n. an instance of visual perception

words.translation: n. 传播, 散布, 伸展；a. 双唇展开的, 伸展的
words.definition: n. process or result of distributing or extending over a wide expanse of space

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确
words.definition: a. consistent with fact or reality; not false

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 较少, 较小；a. 少的, 小的
n. 国家, 民族
words.definition: n. the people who live in a nation or country

words.translation: a. 欢快的, 艳丽的, 快乐的, 放荡的
words.definition: s. full of or showing high-spirited merriment

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 城堡, 象棋中的车；vt. 置于城堡中, 盘踞于
words.definition: n. a large building formerly occupied by a ruler and fortified against attack

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙
words.definition: n. fruit with red or yellow or green skin and sweet to tart crisp whitish flesh

words.translation: n. 面包, 生计, 食物；vt. 裹以面包屑
words.definition: n. food made from dough of flour or meal and usually raised with yeast or baking powder and then baked

words.translation: n. 笑话, 玩笑, 笑柄；v. 开玩笑, 取笑, 作弄
words.definition: n. a humorous anecdote or remark intended to provoke laughter

words.translation: n. 肉, 餐, 食物
words.definition: n. the flesh of animals (including fishes and birds and snails) used as food

words.translation: n. 版本, 版, 翻版
words.definition: n. the form in which a text (especially a printed book) is published

words.translation: n. 下列各项, 部下, 追随者；a. 下列的, 其次的
words.definition: n. a group of followers or enthusiasts

words.translation: a. 庄重的, 壮观的, 显赫的, 重大的, 最高的, 雄伟的, 宏大的, 豪华的, 傲慢的
words.definition: s. large and impressive in physical size or extent

words.translation: a. 明显的, 明白的, 显然的, 平淡无奇的
words.definition: a. easily perceived by the senses or grasped by the mind

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: adv. 因此, 所以
words.definition: r. (used to introduce a logical conclusion) from that fact or reason or as a result

words.translation: adv. 如此, 因此, 到如此程度
words.definition: r. in the way indicated; (`thusly' is a nonstandard variant)

words.translation: n. 受害人, 牺牲者, 牺牲品
words.definition: n. an unfortunate person who suffers from some adverse circumstance

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 现在, 礼品, 瞄准；a. 现在的, 出席的
words.definition: n. the period of time that is happening now; any continuous stretch of time including the moment of speech

words.translation: vi. 属于, 合适
words.definition: v. be owned by; be in the possession of

words.translation: n. 肋条肉, 排骨, 砍, 戳记, 商标；vt. 剁碎, 砍, 切击, 割断
words.definition: n. the irregular motion of waves (usually caused by wind blowing in a direction opposite to the tide)

words.translation: vt. 说服, 使相信
n. 戏剧, 戏剧艺术
words.definition: n. an episode that is turbulent or highly emotional

words.translation: n. 垃圾场；vt. 倾倒, 倾销
words.definition: n. a piece of land where waste materials are dumped

words.translation: n. 财富, 运气, 兴隆, 大量财产, 好运, 命运
words.definition: n. a large amount of wealth or prosperity

words.translation: n. 旅程, 旅行, 行程；vi. 旅行
words.definition: n. the act of traveling from one place to another

words.translation: n. 小路, 巷, 弄, 单行道
words.definition: n. a narrow way or road

words.translation: n. 海军, 海军人员, 海军军力, 烟蒂
words.definition: n. an organization of military vessels belonging to a country and available for sea warfare

words.translation: n. 网, 网状物, 罗网, 净利, 净价；a. 净的, 最终的
words.definition: n. a trap made of netting to catch fish or birds or insects

words.translation: n. 打洞器, 钻孔机, 冲压机, 冲床, 潘趣酒；vt. 以拳重击, 开洞, 冲压
words.definition: n. (boxing) a blow with the fist

words.translation: n. 报酬, 酬谢, 赏金；vt. 奖赏, 酬谢, 给...应有报应
words.definition: n. payment made in return for a service rendered

words.translation: n. 线, 细绳, 一串, 字符串；vt. 串起, 成串, 收紧, 缚, 扎
words.definition: n. a lightweight cord

words.translation: a. 紧急的, 急迫的, 催逼的
n. 冒险, 风险；vt. 敢于, 冒...的危险
words.definition: n. any venturesome undertaking especially one with an uncertain outcome

words.translation: v. 祈祷, 恳求, 请
words.definition: v. address a deity, a prophet, a saint or an object of worship; say a prayer

words.translation: n. 兔子；vi. 猎兔
words.definition: n. any of various burrowing animals of the family Leporidae having long ears and short tails; some domesticated and raised for pets or food

words.translation: n. 食橱, 碗柜, 餐具柜
words.definition: n. a small room (or recess) or cabinet used for storage space

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: vt. 持有, 占有, 拥有, 克制, 支配, 迷住
words.definition: v. have as an attribute, knowledge, or skill

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
a. 离去的, 死去的, 用完的；go的过去分词
words.definition: s. no longer retained

words.translation: adv. 径直地, 直接地, 直率地, 正好地, 直截了当地, (非正式)立即, 马上；conj. 一...(就...), 一当...就...
words.definition: r. without deviation

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 原谅, 赦免；vt. 宽恕, 原谅
words.definition: n. a warrant granting release from punishment for an offense

words.translation: n. 小麦
words.definition: n. annual or biennial grass having erect flower spikes and light brown grains

words.translation: n. 立即, 瞬间；a. 紧急的, 立即的, 即时的
a. 预期的；预料的
words.definition: a. considered likely or probable to happen or arrive

words.translation: a. 令人惊讶的
words.definition: a. causing surprise or wonder or amazement

words.translation: a. 姓氏不详的, 无名的, 无特色的
words.definition: a. having no known name or identity or known source

words.translation: n. 优雅, 风度, 慈悲, 恩惠, 体面, 赦免, 恩典, 谢恩祷告；vt. 使优美
words.definition: n. (Christian theology) a state of sanctification by God; the state of one who is under such divine influence

words.translation: n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人；vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃

words.translation: n. 王国, 领域
words.definition: n. a domain in which something is dominant

words.translation: n. 梯, 梯状物, 发迹的途径；vi. 袜子抽丝, 成名
words.definition: n. steps consisting of two parallel members connected by rungs; for climbing up or down

words.translation: n. 制造, (手工)制造业, 制作, 形成, 发展, 要素, 内在因素, 赚头, 制造物
words.definition: n. (usually plural) the components needed for making or doing something

words.translation: n. 奇迹, 奇事
words.definition: n. any amazing or wonderful occurrence

words.translation: n. 托儿所, 苗圃, 温床
words.definition: n. a child's room for a baby

words.translation: n. 男人, 家伙
n. 旅鸫
words.definition: n. small Old World songbird with a reddish breast

words.translation: n. 馅饼, 财富, 总额, 贪污受贿, 杂乱, 喜鹊

words.translation: n. 弓, 眼睛框；v. 用弓拉琴, 弯成弓形
words.definition: n. a knot with two loops and loose ends; used to tie shoelaces

words.translation: build的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. (used of soaps or cleaning agents) having a substance (an abrasive or filler) added to increase effectiveness

words.translation: n. 纺纱机, 移动吊车, 母驴
words.definition: n. United States architect who designed the first skyscraper in which a metal skeleton was used (1832-1907)

words.translation: n. 学问, 学识, 学习
words.definition: n. the cognitive process of acquiring skill or knowledge

words.translation: n. 保罗（男子名）
words.definition: n. United States feminist (1885-1977)

words.translation: n. 变形, 变质, 变化, 改革, 变换
words.definition: n. a qualitative change
